name: mailjet
description: Send transactional emails using inline HTML/text content or a saved Mailjet template.

auth.hint: Use the Mailjet API key as the Basic-auth username and the API secret key as the password. Store the credential pair in Arthur MCP Secrets.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send one or more transactional email messages with inline HTML/text content.

params.name: Messages
params.description: Array of message objects; each includes From, To, Subject, TextPart, and/or HTMLPart.

tools.name: send_template_email
tools.description: Send a transactional email using a saved Mailjet template ID instead of inline content.

params.name: Messages
params.description: Array of message objects; each includes From, To, Subject, TemplateID, and TemplateLanguage set to true.
